title: veratrum nigrum f. alpinum
intro: Veratrum nigrum f. alpinum, also known as Black Hellebore Alpinum, is a subspecies of the Black Hellebore plant, which belongs to the Melanthiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Veratrum nigrum f. alpinum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, with a recommended dosage of 10-20 drops of the tincture or 1-2 teaspoons of the infusion per day.
